reviews.review_title: Good fun, but needs to be updated.
reviews.review_description:
Lots of minor issues:
- in game store restarts the game.
- not enough game modes or lack thereof
- the main cannon could use a texture update
- audio cuts off randomly

This game is so much fun but it seriously needs an update soon. You can't even go to the little store within the game without having to restart the whole game. It's super annoying,  but nonetheless it's an awesome game!

I really like this game (it’s a lot of fun) but I can’t figure out how to equip the power ups.  It shows that I have them but I don’t know how to equip/arm the cannon.  Please advise how to do this and thanks!

Update:  I figured out how to use the power ups when I play with my gamepad .. I just can’t get them to work with the Go controller.

reviews.review_title: Can only play with touch pad.
reviews.review_description: This information is not clearly communicated.
